description_long: This is an adult pedestrian with a casual urban appearance, wearing a hooded sweatshirt featuring a prominent logo on the front and back. The individual has long, wavy hair styled to one side and is wearing large, round goggles over their eyes. The outfit includes fitted pants and classic lace-up sneakers, with fingerless gloves covering the hands. The figure's stance is upright and relaxed, with arms slightly outstretched. The overall look suggests a youthful, streetwear-inspired style suitable for city environments.
description: A casually dressed adult with long, wavy hair, a hooded sweatshirt with a logo, fitted pants, sneakers, and goggles, standing upright with arms slightly out.
description_view_0: Front view shows the logo on the sweatshirt, goggles, long hair draped over one shoulder, and fingerless gloves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the side fall of the hair, and the layered look of the clothing.
description_view_2: Back view displays the hood, the large logo on the back of the sweatshirt, and the straight fall of the hair.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the other profile, the hair's volume, and the fit of the pants and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: casual hooded sweatshirt, fitted pants, fingerless gloves, and classic sneakers
attribute_hairstyle: long wavy hair styled to one side
